creator: goffredo@gmail.com
text:
When a Palm is connected in USB, and hotsync button pressed, the devices /dev/cuaU0 and /dev/ttyU0 are created, but the usbd send as ${DEVNAME} ucom0.

        attach "/home/goffredo/pilot-sync.sh ${DEVNAME}"

The ${DEVNAME} wil be ucom0 instead cuaU0 or ttyU0.

It may be usb/106070 consequence.
